infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ChitChat needs camera access to take photos and make video calls.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ChitChat needs microphone access for voice messages and calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ChitChat needs photo library access to send photos and set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ChitChat needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: ChitChat uses Face ID to securely sign you in.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: ChitChat needs calendar access to read and create events.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: ChitChat needs contacts access to help you connect with people you know.
